text: When compressor motor of Chiller 6 at MAIN site fails, what is the temporal behavior of the power input?

tasks.task_description: Analyze Chiller 6 compressor motor failure power behavior
tasks.agent_name: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
tasks.final_answer:
This behavior can include fluctuations or spikes in power consumption preceding the failure. 

Rewritten to ≤ 10 words: 
Power consumption may fluctuate or spike before failing completely.
tasks.review: Task Status: Accomplished | identified temporal behavior | improve tool usage or error handling.
